services.title: Flooring Installation
services.body: Solid wood, engineered and laminate flooring

services.title: Wood Finishing & Staining
services.body: Professional finishing services for all types of wood

services.title: Deck Building & Repair
services.body: Custom decks and outdoor living spaces

faqs.q: Do you use FSC certified wood?
faqs.a: Yes, we prioritize using FSC certified sustainable timber.

faqs.q: Can you provide a quote for kitchen refurbishment?
faqs.a: Certainly. We offer free quotes and detailed project plans.

faqs.q: How long does it take to complete a custom furniture piece?
faqs.a: Typically 2-4 weeks, depending on the complexity of the design.

faqs.q: Do you work with homeowners directly?
faqs.a: Yes — we provide direct services for residential projects.
